subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou be occupied with His remembrance and praise on this divine Day, and engaged in that which He loveth and with which He is well-pleased [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در این یوم الهی بذکر و ثنا مشغول باشی و بما یحب و یرضی عامل در آنچه
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
